title: Dungeons & Crafting
description:
A rpg mod that is all about dnd.
requires geckolib
body:
# Dungeons & Crafting

This mod is all about dungeons and dragons, it adds character creation, stat sheet, tool proficencies, skills, spells, weapons, stats, dices, mobs, materials and more

 

Features:

- Character creation which includes choosing your custom name that is displayed in chat and above your head

- 6 custom classes

- races (human,dwarf,elf)

- stats and skills, currently the mod has 27 skills, which of only 8 are working(Mine, Jump, Acrobatics, Stealth, Perception, Insight, Investigation, Swimming), mobs have their stats initialized when spawned.

- leveling up your chosen class (xp is dropped from various sources, to level up click the level up text in character screen)

- ore gen, new materials and resources.

- new weapons and 1 new mob.

- dice is rolled on the right corner of your screen whenever a specific action is performed such as skill etc.

- inventory weight capacity(each item has initialized weight that is based on its crafting ingredients or default value), increase max capacity with stats

- magic spells and scrolls 

Notes:
- Geckolib will no longer be required once the mod is updated to minecraft 1.20+

Goals:
- ~~100 downloads~~
- ~~250 downloads~~
- ~~500 downloads~~
- ~~1000 downloads~~
- 5000 downloads
- 10000 downloads
